form_categories.label: Core Bid Submission
form_categories.description: Core forms required for most bid submissions.

form_categories.label: Eligibility Declaration
form_categories.description: Declarations regarding eligibility, corruption, conflict, independence, or statutory status.

form_categories.label: Security Instrument
form_categories.description: Tender security or tender-securing declaration forms.

form_categories.label: Participation Structure
form_categories.description: Forms related to joint ventures, foreign tenderer participation, or local input commitments.

form_categories.label: Qualification Evidence
form_categories.description: Forms related to experience, finance, personnel, equipment, or qualifications.

form_categories.label: Technical Proposal
form_categories.description: Forms related to methodology, technical proposal, alternatives, ESHS, or works execution approach.

form_categories.label: Ownership Disclosure
form_categories.description: Beneficial ownership or ownership/control disclosure forms.

form_categories.label: Contract Security
form_categories.description: Forms generated or required after award or before contract signature.

form_categories.label: Downstream Contract Form
form_categories.description: Contract forms that are downstream from bid submission.

respondent_types.label: Bidder
respondent_types.description: Form is completed by the tenderer or bidder during bid submission.

respondent_types.label: Bidder or Joint Venture
respondent_types.description: Form is completed by an individual bidder or joint venture.

respondent_types.label: Joint Venture
respondent_types.description: Form is completed only when a joint venture participates.

respondent_types.label: Foreign Tenderer
respondent_types.description: Form is completed when foreign tenderer or local input requirements apply.

respondent_types.label: Successful Bidder
respondent_types.description: Form is completed only by the successful bidder after award or before contract signing.

respondent_types.label: Procuring Entity
respondent_types.description: Form or generated record belongs to the procuring entity.

respondent_types.label: System Generated
respondent_types.description: Form or checklist item is generated by the system from workflow data.

workflow_stages.label: Bid Preparation
workflow_stages.description: Form is visible to bidder before submission.

workflow_stages.label: Bid Submission
workflow_stages.description: Form is part of the bid submission package.

workflow_stages.label: Award
workflow_stages.description: Form is used at intention-to-award or award stage.

workflow_stages.label: Contract Signature
workflow_stages.description: Form is required before or during contract signature.

workflow_stages.label: Contract Execution
workflow_stages.description: Form is relevant after contract signature.

workflow_stages.label: POC Checklist Only
workflow_stages.description: Form is represented only as a checklist item in this POC.

evidence_policies.label: Structured Only
evidence_policies.description: Form should be completed as structured fields; no routine upload expected.

evidence_policies.label: Structured With Optional Evidence
evidence_policies.description: Form is structured but may later allow controlled evidence attachments.

evidence_policies.label: Structured With Required Evidence Later
evidence_policies.description: Form is structured at bid stage; evidence may be required later for verification.

evidence_policies.label: Issuer Verification Future
evidence_policies.description: Instrument should later be verified through issuer, bank, or insurer workflow rather than scanned upload.

evidence_policies.label: Generated After Award
evidence_policies.description: Form is generated later from award or contract data.

evidence_policies.label: POC Checklist Only
evidence_policies.description: POC only records the form as required or not required.

forms.title: Form of Tender
forms.poc_treatment: Represented as a structured bidder-response schema and checklist item. Full bid submission is outside this POC.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Bidder Name
minimum_schema_fields.description: Legal name of the bidder or joint venture.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Tender Price
minimum_schema_fields.description: Total tender price submitted by bidder.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Discount Offered
minimum_schema_fields.description: Any discount and method of application.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Authorized Signatory
minimum_schema_fields.description: Name of person authorized to sign the tender.

forms.title: Tenderer's Eligibility - Confidential Business Questionnaire
forms.source_reference: Section IV - Tenderer's Eligibility / Confidential Business Questionnaire
forms.poc_treatment: Represented as a structured eligibility and business profile schema. Registry verification and evidence upload are outside this POC.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Legal Name
minimum_schema_fields.description: Legal business name of tenderer.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Registration Number
minimum_schema_fields.description: Business or company registration number.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Ownership Type
minimum_schema_fields.description: Type of ownership or legal form.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Directors or Partners
minimum_schema_fields.description: Structured list of directors, partners, or principals.

forms.title: Certificate of Independent Tender Determination
forms.source_reference: Section IV - Certificate of Independent Tender Determination
forms.poc_treatment: Represented as structured declarations and signatory fields. Digital signature handling is outside this POC.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Independent Determination Confirmed
minimum_schema_fields.description: Bidder confirms independent tender determination.

minimum_schema_fields.label: No Collusion Confirmed
minimum_schema_fields.description: Bidder confirms non-collusive conduct.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Authorized Signatory
minimum_schema_fields.description: Name of authorized signatory.

forms.title: Self-Declaration Form
forms.poc_treatment: Represented as structured declarations on corruption, debarment, conflict, and eligibility. External verification is outside this POC.

minimum_schema_fields.label: No Corruption Declaration
minimum_schema_fields.description: Bidder declares non-engagement in corrupt or fraudulent practices.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Not Debarred Declaration
minimum_schema_fields.description: Bidder declares it is not debarred.

minimum_schema_fields.label: No Conflict Declaration
minimum_schema_fields.description: Bidder declares no conflict of interest.

forms.title: Form of Tender Security
forms.source_reference: Section IV - Form of Tender Security
forms.poc_treatment: Represented as a checklist/schema item when tender security is selected. Future implementation should prefer issuer verification over scanned uploads.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Issuer Name
minimum_schema_fields.description: Name of bank, insurer, or approved financial institution issuing the security.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Security Amount
minimum_schema_fields.description: Amount of the tender security.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Valid Until
minimum_schema_fields.description: Expiry date of the tender security.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Security Reference Number
minimum_schema_fields.description: Issuer reference number for the security instrument.

checklist_display.required_label: Required when Tender Security is selected
checklist_display.not_required_label: Not required unless Tender Security is selected

forms.title: Form of Tender-Securing Declaration
forms.source_reference: Section IV - Form of Tender-Securing Declaration
forms.poc_treatment: Represented as a structured declaration checklist item when tender-securing declaration mode is selected.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Declaration Accepted
minimum_schema_fields.description: Bidder accepts the tender-securing declaration terms.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Authorized Signatory
minimum_schema_fields.description: Name of authorized signatory.

checklist_display.required_label: Required when Tender-Securing Declaration is selected
checklist_display.not_required_label: Not required unless Tender-Securing Declaration is selected

forms.title: Joint Venture Information Form
forms.source_reference: Section I / Section IV - Joint Venture participation information
forms.poc_treatment: Represented as a structured JV details form. JV agreement evidence handling is outside this POC.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Joint Venture Name
minimum_schema_fields.description: Name of the joint venture or proposed joint venture.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Lead Member
minimum_schema_fields.description: Lead member authorized to represent the joint venture.

minimum_schema_fields.label: JV Members
minimum_schema_fields.description: Structured list of joint venture members.

checklist_display.required_label: Required when JV participation is allowed/applicable
checklist_display.not_required_label: Not required when JV participation is not allowed/applicable

forms.title: Foreign Tenderer Local Input Form
forms.source_reference: Section IV - Foreign Tenderers 40% Rule / local input commitment
forms.poc_treatment: Represented as structured local input commitments for foreign tenderer scenarios. Verification workflow is outside this POC.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Local Input Percentage
minimum_schema_fields.description: Percentage of contract inputs committed to citizen suppliers, contractors, or labour.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Local Suppliers or Contractors
minimum_schema_fields.description: Structured list of local suppliers or subcontractors.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Commitment Declaration
minimum_schema_fields.description: Tenderer confirms commitment to applicable local input requirement.

checklist_display.required_label: Required for foreign tenderer/local input scenarios
checklist_display.not_required_label: Not required unless activated by tender scope or participation rules

forms.title: Alternative Technical Proposal Form
forms.source_reference: Section I / TDS - Alternative Tenders; Section IV - Technical Proposal
forms.poc_treatment: Represented as a structured alternative proposal form activated only when alternative tenders are allowed.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Alternative Description
minimum_schema_fields.description: Description of the proposed alternative technical solution.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Affected Works Parts
minimum_schema_fields.description: Parts of the works affected by the alternative.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Price or Time Impact
minimum_schema_fields.description: Summary of price, time, or performance impact of the alternative.

checklist_display.required_label: Required when alternative tenders are allowed
checklist_display.not_required_label: Not required when alternatives are not allowed

forms.title: Technical Proposal Form
forms.source_reference: Section IV - Technical Proposal / work methods, equipment, personnel, and schedule
forms.poc_treatment: Represented as structured technical response sections. Full technical proposal submission is outside this POC.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Methodology
minimum_schema_fields.description: Bidder's proposed work methodology.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Work Programme
minimum_schema_fields.description: Summary work programme or schedule.

minimum_schema_fields.label: ESHS Approach
minimum_schema_fields.description: Environmental, social, health and safety approach where applicable.

forms.title: Similar Experience Form
forms.source_reference: Section III / Section IV - Qualification information for similar contracts
forms.poc_treatment: Represented as structured prior contract records. Client/reference verification is outside this POC.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Contract Title
minimum_schema_fields.description: Title or description of similar contract.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Contract Value
minimum_schema_fields.description: Value of similar contract.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Client Name
minimum_schema_fields.description: Name of client or employer for the similar contract.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Completion Status
minimum_schema_fields.description: Completion status of the similar contract.

forms.title: Financial Capacity Form
forms.source_reference: Section III / Section IV - Financial capacity and turnover qualification information
forms.poc_treatment: Represented as structured turnover and liquidity information. Audited accounts handling is outside this POC.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Annual Turnover Values
minimum_schema_fields.description: Structured annual turnover values for required years.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Liquid Assets or Credit Line
minimum_schema_fields.description: Liquid assets, credit line, or other financial means available.

forms.title: Personnel Schedule Form
forms.poc_treatment: Represented as a structured personnel schedule. CV upload or credential verification is outside this POC.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Role
minimum_schema_fields.description: Required project role.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Person Name
minimum_schema_fields.description: Name of proposed personnel.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Qualifications
minimum_schema_fields.description: Summary qualifications and experience.

checklist_display.required_label: Required when key personnel are required
checklist_display.not_required_label: Not required when key personnel are not required

forms.title: Equipment Schedule Form
forms.poc_treatment: Represented as a structured equipment schedule. Ownership or lease evidence handling is outside this POC.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Equipment Type
minimum_schema_fields.description: Type of equipment proposed.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Quantity
minimum_schema_fields.description: Quantity of equipment available.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Availability Status
minimum_schema_fields.description: Ownership, lease, hire, or availability status.

checklist_display.required_label: Required when equipment information is required
checklist_display.not_required_label: Not required when equipment information is not required

forms.title: Beneficial Ownership Disclosure Form
forms.source_reference: Section X - Beneficial Ownership Disclosure Form
forms.poc_treatment: Represented as a structured beneficial ownership disclosure form. Registry integration and verification are outside this POC.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Beneficial Owner Name
minimum_schema_fields.description: Name of beneficial owner.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Ownership or Control Percentage
minimum_schema_fields.description: Percentage ownership or control.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Nature of Control
minimum_schema_fields.description: Description of ownership or control.

checklist_display.required_label: Required when beneficial ownership disclosure is enabled
checklist_display.not_required_label: Not required unless beneficial ownership disclosure is enabled

forms.title: Performance Security Form
forms.poc_treatment: Represented as a downstream contract form checklist item. Actual generation after award is outside this POC.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Security Amount or Percentage
minimum_schema_fields.description: Performance security amount or percentage required from successful bidder.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Issuer Name
minimum_schema_fields.description: Issuer of performance security, if known at contract signature stage.

checklist_display.required_label: Required when performance security is enabled
checklist_display.not_required_label: Not required when performance security is not enabled

forms.title: Advance Payment Security Form
forms.poc_treatment: Represented as a downstream contract form checklist item. Actual generation after award is outside this POC.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Advance Amount
minimum_schema_fields.description: Advance amount to be secured, if applicable.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Issuer Name
minimum_schema_fields.description: Issuer of advance payment security, if known at contract signature stage.

checklist_display.required_label: Required when advance payment security is enabled
checklist_display.not_required_label: Not required when advance payment security is not enabled

forms.title: Retention Money Security Form
forms.poc_treatment: Represented as a downstream contract form checklist item. Actual generation after award is outside this POC.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Retention Amount or Percentage
minimum_schema_fields.description: Retention amount or percentage to be secured, if applicable.

minimum_schema_fields.label: Issuer Name
minimum_schema_fields.description: Issuer of retention money security, if known at contract signature stage.

checklist_display.required_label: Required when retention money security is enabled
checklist_display.not_required_label: Not required when retention money security is not enabled
